title: Roasted Heirloom Tomatoes
instructions:
Use a foil cookie sheet or a cookie sheet covered in foil.
Place the tomatoes and the garlic in a large bowl and toss with the olive oil until evenly coated. Season with salt & pepper and spread on the foil sheet.
Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until the skins have popped and the tomatoes have begun to brown.
